title: Product Brief — Stage 3 (Post-Offer)
description: Product brief enriched with the Offer Agent's output. This is the final version used to populate the Copywriting Agent's shared context.

ump.description: Unique Mechanism of the Problem. Source: Offer Agent Step 3 — selected UMP.

ums.description: Unique Mechanism of the Solution. Source: Offer Agent Step 3 — selected UMS.

core_promise.description: The central promise of the offer. Source: Offer Agent Step 4.

value_stack_summary.description: List of value stack components. Source: Offer Agent Step 4 — value stack section.

guarantee_type.description: Type of guarantee offered. Source: Offer Agent Step 4 — guarantee section.

pricing_rationale.description: Why the price is set where it is. Source: Offer Agent Step 4 — pricing section.

awareness_level_primary.description: Source: Offer Agent Step 2 — Market Calibration.

sophistication_level.description: Eugene Schwartz sophistication level (1-5). Source: Offer Agent Step 2.

composite_score.description: Offer Agent's final composite score (0-10). Source: Offer Agent Step 5.

variant_selected.description: Which offer variant the operator selected. Source: Offer Agent Step 5.
